title: Isha Upanishad (Complete)
description: From the Isha Upanishad (Complete) — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Isha Upanishad (Complete) — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: All this — whatever moves in this moving world — is enveloped by God. Therefore, find your enjoyment in renunciation. Do not covet what belongs to others. He who sees all beings in his own self and his own self in all beings — does not hate anyone after that. Where there is oneness, what could deceive whom?
